scenarios.name: Erie.Pro Revenue Action Router
scenarios.purpose: Poll planned route actions and fan them into SuiteDash, Taskade, ProductDyno, or internal Erie.Pro follow-up.
scenarios.successSignal: Each action receives an external Boost.space record ID and moves from planned to queued.

body.ownerNote: Erie.Pro Revenue Action Router accepted the action.

scenarios.name: Erie.Pro Delivery Dispatch
scenarios.purpose: Poll deliver actions for paid ThriveCart/checkout events and create the fulfillment work item.
scenarios.successSignal: Paid offer actions route to the correct fulfillment owner with offer and service metadata attached.

body.ownerNote: Erie.Pro Delivery Dispatch accepted the action.

scenarios.name: Erie.Pro Recovery Dispatch
scenarios.purpose: Poll recover actions for abandoned, failed, refunded, or cancelled revenue events.
scenarios.successSignal: Recovery actions create the appropriate follow-up path without losing coupon, affiliate, source, or offer context.

body.ownerNote: Erie.Pro Recovery Dispatch accepted the action.

scenarios.name: Erie.Pro Learning Sync
scenarios.purpose: Poll learn actions and sync attribution dimensions into the reporting destination.
scenarios.successSignal: Attribution dimensions are persisted and the action is closed as completed.

body.ownerNote: Erie.Pro Learning Sync accepted the action.
